Description:
Inclusive diffractive DIS events for 10x100 GeV configuration. Q² range: 1 to 10⁴ GeV². Generated with RAPGAP 3.303 for forward proton tagging (Roman Pot/B0) and Large Rapidity Gap (LRG) selection methods. Used for diffractive structure function
measurements and cross-section extraction in ePIC early science.
